summary: ORBITRADE Iteration 12 - Admin features testing completed. All 5 requested features verified: Tournament admin controls (Edit/Stop/Delete), Payment settings management, ORBITRADE metadata, PWA install prompt, and consistent bg-app background across all pages.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns valid token ✓
Backend: GET /api/tournaments returns tournament list ✓
Backend: PUT /api/admin/tournaments/{id} updates tournament name ✓
Backend: PUT /api/admin/tournaments/{id} updates prize pool ✓
Backend: PUT /api/admin/tournaments/{id} changes status to 'ended' (Stop) ✓
Backend: PUT /api/admin/tournaments/{id} changes status to 'active' (Resume) ✓
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/tournaments/{id} removes tournament ✓
Backend: DELETE nonexistent tournament returns 404 ✓
Backend: GET /api/admin/payment-settings returns all expected fields ✓
Backend: POST /api/admin/payment-settings saves settings ✓
Backend: Payment settings persist correctly after save ✓
Backend: Regular user cannot access payment settings (403) ✓
Backend: /api/health returns 200 ✓
Backend: /api/assets returns asset list ✓
Backend: /api/prices returns price data ✓
Frontend: Admin Tournaments tab shows Edit/Stop/Delete buttons ✓
Frontend: Edit button opens inline form with name/prize/status fields ✓
Frontend: Admin Payments tab shows deposit fee settings ✓
Frontend: Admin Payments tab shows withdrawal fee settings ✓
Frontend: Save Payment Settings button present ✓
Frontend: All pages use consistent bg-app background (rgb(8,8,8)) ✓
Frontend: PageBackground component renders ambient gradient effects ✓
Frontend: No 'ORBITAL' text in metadata (all ORBITRADE) ✓
Frontend: OG title contains ORBITRADE ✓
Frontend: InstallPrompt component exists and renders conditionally ✓
Frontend: Auth page has bg-app background ✓
Frontend: Dashboard has bg-app background ✓
Frontend: Deposit page has bg-app background ✓
Frontend: Withdraw page has bg-app background ✓
Frontend: Affiliate page has bg-app background ✓
Frontend: Tournaments page has bg-app background ✓
Frontend: Profile page has bg-app background ✓
Frontend: Legal page has bg-app background ✓
Frontend: Landing page has bg-app background ✓
seed_data_creation: Created test tournament via API for testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features from this iteration verified working: 1) Tournament admin controls (Edit opens inline form, Stop/Resume change status, Delete removes tournament), 2) Payment settings tab with deposit/withdrawal fee management, 3) All ORBITRADE metadata (no ORBITAL), 4) PWA InstallPrompt component exists and renders conditionally (requires beforeinstallprompt event or iOS), 5) Consistent bg-app (#080808) background across all pages including Auth, Dashboard, Deposit, Withdraw, Affiliate, Tournaments, Admin, Profile, Legal, Landing. Login requires slide-to-verify captcha on UI but can be bypassed via API.
